mapper.sql: a.id, a.name, a.extend_name AS "extendName", a.mime_type AS "mimeType", a.owner_id AS "ownerId", a.owner_type AS "ownerType", a.enable_flag AS "enableFlag", a.priority, a.remarks, a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate", a.del_flag AS "delFlag"
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM assist_storage a WHERE a.id IN #{item}
SELECT mime_type FROM assist_storage GROUP BY mime_type ORDER BY mime_type
SELECT business_type FROM assist_storage_business GROUP BY business_type ORDER BY business_type
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO assist_storage(id, name, extend_name, mime_type, owner_id, owner_type, enable_flag, priority, remarks, create_date, update_date, del_flag) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{extendName}, #{mimeType}, #{ownerId}, #{ownerType}, #{enableFlag}, #{priority}, #{remarks}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate}, #{delFlag})
mapper.update: UPDATE assist_storage SET name = #{name}, extend_name = #{extendName}, mime_type = #{mimeType}, owner_id = #{ownerId}, owner_type = #{ownerType}, enable_flag = #{enableFlag}, priority = #{priority}, remarks = #{remarks}, update_date = #{updateDate}, del_flag = #{delFlag} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT a.file_id AS "id", a.business_id AS "businessId", a.business_type AS "businessType", a.business_params AS "businessParams", a.public_flag AS "publicFlag" FROM assist_storage_business a WHERE a.file_id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO assist_storage_business(file_id, business_id, business_type, business_params, public_flag)
SELECT #{item.id}, #{item.businessId}, #{item.businessType}, #{item.businessParams}, #{item.publicFlag} FROM dual
